canonical_definition: A 300-item personality questionnaire from the International Personality Item Pool used to measure the Big Five personality traits, used in this paper as a generalization target for models aligned on IPIP-NEO-120 data.
papers: Neuron based Personality Trait Induction in Large Language Models
Personality Alignment of Large Language Models

definitions.text: A 300-item personality questionnaire from the International Personality Item Pool used to measure the Big Five personality traits, used in this paper as a generalization target for models aligned on IPIP-NEO-120 data.
definitions.paper: Personality Alignment of Large Language Models

relationships.paper: Personality Alignment of Large Language Models
relationships.evidence: While the Big Five (IPIP) samples measure adaptive personality traits through IPIP-NEO-120 and IPIP-NEO-300 questionnaires, the Dark Triad samples assess subclinical maladaptive traits

iclr25: Personality Alignment of Large Language Models
